docker_harness_scope.cost: multi-GB image per instance, x86 emulation on arm64; a focused build, not a code gate - scoped here, not built
docker_harness_scope.provides: pinned per-instance Python and dependencies via the official SWE-bench Docker images (or arm64 variants), matching each instance's original environment
docker_harness_scope.resolves: the environment-fidelity failures measured in iter114 (native harness ~0.94 on same-era django), iter124, and iter130 (pre-3.10 sympy instances that import removed stdlib and cannot run on Python 3.11)

evaluation: symbolic exact simplification with a free Symbol (universally quantified, not sampled)
finding: symbolic property evaluation removes the numeric float-precision artifact and is stronger than sampling (it proves the identity for all x); the Docker harness is scoped as the path to running the environment-fidelity-blocked instances
